{{Infobox location
| name = Rainworth
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Rainworth is a long-standing town located near the [[Empire]]'s [[Capital]]. Throughout its fifteen-hundred-year history, it has served various roles, including a center for culture and art from the [[Heartland]], a refuge for those fleeing conflict, and a hub for businesses that operate outside the [[Capital]]. The town is known for its significant fishing industry, which includes large-scale industrial warehouses and docks. Currently, the town is a crowded location housing many members of the [[Order]] and various [[Independents]], leading to constant preparations for potential attacks. The area contains several notable landmarks, such as the [[Rainworth Imperial Library]]—which features a large underground emergency shelter—and is subject to seismic activity. The town's workforce and docks are heavily influenced by the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]], which utilizes workers and [[Masons]] to gather information. Additionally, Rainworth is a place where many individuals are born and raised, possessing an intimate knowledge of its streets and inhabitants.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rainworth]] is a location where agents are stationed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rainworth]] is a town that has stood for fifteen hundred years.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rainworth]] is where most of the [[Luminian Order]] is located.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Rainworth]] is a location.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Rainworth]] is a city located close to the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]]'s first fit caused earthquakes in [[Rainworth]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
